change: Corrected the canonical-resolution envelope, execution contracts, cohort aggregation, grounding policy, rendering-discovery condition, structured discovery outputs and resumable sampling, language-persistence controls, and the request-more-information action contract.
changed_artifacts: REQUEST_MORE_INFORMATION ontology, case, procedure, requests, elicitation, and interfaces
comparability_impact: v0.1.0 results remain historical and are not replaced. P3, LP3, gold/runtime headline, rendering, and persistence results are not directly comparable because their measurement contracts were corrected. REQUEST_MORE_INFORMATION results are also not directly comparable because v0.2.0 requires an explicit reporter message and models notification plus an awaiting-reporter state while preserving support ownership.
approval_source: request and rendering artifact review records
